user.title: Connect xAI Grok Usage
user.description:
Enter Grok credentials from another machine where `grok login` was completed.

Required: Access Token
Optional: Account ID and Refresh Token

Open ~/.grok/auth.json. Under the `auth.x.ai::...` entry, copy `key` to Access Token, `refresh_token` to Refresh Token, and optionally `team_id` or `user_id` to Account ID.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect xAI Grok Usage
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are invalid or expired. Enter fresh credentials from a machine where Grok is logged in.

error.invalid_access_token: Credential validation failed. Ensure the token is fresh and copied correctly.

abort.already_configured: This Grok account is already configured
abort.account_mismatch: Re-authentication must use the same Grok account
